name: Oryza Ilyas Aryaduta - Diploma IV Student of Electronics Engineering at Politeknik Negeri Semarang
description: I am a Diploma IV student of Electronics Engineering at Politeknik Negeri Semarang, with a strong passion for embedded systems, Internet of Things (IoT), and hardware design. I have gained practical experience in these areas through various academic projects, where I have developed innovative solutions and honed my technical skills. My dedication to continuous learning and problem-solving drives me to stay updated with the latest advancements in technology, enabling me to contribute effectively to the field of electronics engineering.
